---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with ClipCam-AE
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear, concise description of what went wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Open `.clip` file `...`
2. Click `...`
3. See error `...`

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / recording

If applicable, drop a screenshot or short screen recording here.

## Environment

- **OS**: Windows 10 / 11 (version)
- **After Effects**: e.g. 2024 (24.0.3)
- **Clip Studio Paint**: e.g. EX 3.0.2
- **ClipCam-AE version**: from `CSXS/manifest.xml` or Release tag

## Sample file

If possible, attach the `.clip` or `.clipcam` file that triggers the bug (zip it if GitHub rejects the extension). A 2-frame reproducer is better than a long description.

## Console output

Open the panel, right-click → Inspect → Console tab, reproduce the bug, then paste the relevant log lines here:

```
(paste here)
```

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — similar files that work, recent changes to your AE setup, etc.
